68fda9d41fd794cc6b3e1a94.question: In a play by this author, Joe Keller and Steve Deever sell faulty airplane parts to the government during World War II. After the premier of that play, All My Sons, this playwright was investigated by HUAC for being a suspected communist, which inspired a play where (*) Abigail Williams spreads false accusations at John Proctor during the Salem Witch Trials. In another play by this author, the former high-school football star Biff and his brother Happy are a source of disappointment for their father, who commits suicide at the end for life insurance money. For 10 points, name this American playwright of The Crucible and that play about Willy Loman, Death of a Salesman.

For 10 points, name this American playwright of The Crucible and that play about Willy Loman, Death of a Salesman.

A skyscraper that has changed its lighting at night to match Taylor Swift’s recent album drops is located in this site of the (*) Seagram Building and the Chrysler Building. For 10 points, name this city home to the Empire State Building and the One World Trade Center.
68fda9d41fd794cc6b3e1a99.question_sanitized: Philip Johnson and Ludwig Mies van der Rohe collaborated on an International Style building in this city that serves as the headquarters of a Canadian distiller. For 10 points, name this city home to the Empire State Building and the One World Trade Center.
68fda9d41fd794cc6b3e1a99.answer_sanitized: New York City [or NYC; accept Manhattan]
